zh.Waltham Abbey, Essex, England: 英國艾可沃爾坦 艾比
zh.lifeSummary: Agnes於大約1500年出生在英國。她於大約1524年與John Harrison在英國艾可沃爾坦 艾比結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1582年3月10日在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 波托爾福也斯 邱奇 阿爾蓋特享年83歲，埋葬在英國艾可。

zh-hans.Waltham Abbey, Essex, England: 英国艾可沃爾坦 艾比
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agnes于大约1500年出生在英国。她于大约1524年与John Harrison在英国艾可沃爾坦 艾比结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1582年3月10日在英国英格兰倫敦聖 波托爾福也斯 邱奇 阿爾蓋特享年83岁，埋葬在英国艾可。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: Agnes was born about 1500, in England. She married John Harrison about 1524, in Waltham Abbey, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 10 March 1582, in Saint Botolph's Church Aldgate, London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 83, and was buried in Essex, England.

ja.St Botolph Aldgate, London, England: イギリスイギリスロンドンサイント ボトルフ'ス チャーチ アルドガト
ja.Waltham Abbey, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスワルサム アビー
ja.lifeSummary: Agnesは約1500年にイギリスで生まれた。約1524年にイギリスエセックスワルサム アビーでJohn Harrisonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1582年3月10日にイギリスイギリスロンドンサイント ボトルフ'ス チャーチ アルドガトで83歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスにて埋葬された。

ko.St Botolph Aldgate, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 세인트 벗프'스 c후르치 알드가트
ko.lifeSummary: Agnes(은)는 대략 1500년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1524년 영국 에세스 월섬 애브브이에서 John Harrison(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1582년 3월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 세인트 벗프'스 c후르치 알드가트에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스에 묻혔다.

У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 10 марта 1582 г. в местности сеинт ботолф'с чурч алджэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 83 лет и была похоронена в местности эссекс, Англия.
